title: TUI format_time_us doesn't handle negative time values
description:
file: python/src/lichen/tui/app.py:45-59

The format_time_us function doesn't validate that time_us is non-negative. If a negative value is passed (e.g., from a time calculation error or rollover), it produces confusing output like '-500us' or '-1.234s' rather than returning a sentinel like '--'.

Example:
  format_time_us(-500)  # Returns '-500us' instead of '--' or similar

While simulation time should never be negative, defensive handling would prevent confusing display output if a calculation error occurs upstream.
notes: Fixed format_time_us to return "--" for negative times (c2b1ddcec). Updated docstring. Verified with manual tests and ruff lint.
close_reason: Implemented defensive handling for negative time_us in format_time_us; returns '--' sentinel. Lint and manual tests pass. Commit c2b1ddcec pushed.
